_comment: ADOPTER EXAMPLE — the product passport (Loom 2.0 §7.1). Section keys are compiled by the policy compiler from the profiles; the product-approval gate verifies every required section has substance and every approval resolves to a HUMAN registry identity holding the role. PA1 is approved (the change is in delivery); PA2 is pending until launch.

classification.summary: Affordability model added to retail credit-limit decisioning.

target-market.included: Existing retail credit customers, salaried, resident in the UAE
target-market.excluded: Customers in collections or forbearance; income below AED 5,000/month
target-market.foreseeable_harm: Over-extension of credit to borderline-affordability customers

regulatory-obligations.notes: Affordability and suitability obligations apply; model in the decision path.

cbuae-notification-assessment.rationale: Material change within existing product licence; monitored threshold not crossed.

credit-risk-appetite.limit_changes: Per-customer limit unchanged; portfolio cap unchanged

pa2._comment: PA2 (permission to launch) requires the full section set and every compiled control-function approval — completed after delivery, before launch.
